deployment.name: Voice Support Agent (Sierra / Bland-class)
deployment.description: Worked example for a voice-based customer support agent: real-time STT → LLM → TTS, multi-turn phone-style calls, latency-critical (no audit-class verifier — only inline gates fit the budget). Demonstrates: STT/TTS as registry tools with per-call pricing, high calls_per_query (one round per voice turn), inline-only verification (MiniCheck), no FactReasoner FR2/FR3 because the user is on the line waiting. Defaults model an inbound support line: 50K customers, ~4% call-rate per month, ~12-turn average call.

_calibration.source: Estimated from public voice-agent vendor pricing (OpenAI Whisper, OpenAI TTS, ElevenLabs, Sierra public talks). LLM token sizes reflect realistic support-call summarization patterns.
_calibration.reference: Sierra public demos; OpenAI Whisper pricing page; ElevenLabs pricing page

anchor_query.example: Caller: 'I need to reschedule my appointment for next Tuesday.' Agent: looks up customer → confirms appointment exists → checks available slots → confirms new time → sends SMS confirmation.

voice_stt_whisper.label: Voice STT · OpenAI Whisper
voice_stt_whisper.description: Speech-to-text via Whisper API. Billed per minute of audio. Each conversational turn (~5–10 sec speech) ≈ 0.15 min on average.

voice_tts_openai.label: Voice TTS · OpenAI tts-1
voice_tts_openai.description: Text-to-speech via OpenAI tts-1. Billed at $15 per 1M chars; per-call rate baked in for an avg ~250-char spoken response (~4 sec).

voice_tts_elevenlabs.label: Voice TTS · ElevenLabs (premium voices)
voice_tts_elevenlabs.description: Higher-quality voice synthesis. ~5× the cost of OpenAI tts-1 but markedly better latency + naturalness for premium plans.

customer_lookup.label: Customer Lookup (internal)
customer_lookup.description: Pull caller's account from internal CRM (Salesforce / HubSpot / internal). Free per-call; ~150 tok of record returned.

calendar_check.label: Calendar / Booking System
calendar_check.description: Check availability slots, modify booking. Internal API call.

agents.label: Voice Assistant (single agent)
agents.description: Main conversational LLM. Each user turn = one LLM call. The 12-turn average call is captured via questions_per_session=12 on the segment. Sysprompt holds brand voice + escalation rules + brief tool catalog.

default.label: Mixed support calls (60% full · 25% quick · 15% complex)

segments.label: Support callers
segments.description: Customer base; ~4% call support each month (60K calls / 50K customers / 30 days). 12-turn avg call.
